title: Notebook
description: Notebook is a client-side Fabric mod that lets you create, manage, and share draggable To-Do lists and item collection quotas directly from your screen.
body:
![Notebook Mod](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/Notebook/main/BANNER.gif)

![Fabric Only](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-blue?logo=fabricmc&logoColor=white)
![Client Side](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Client--Side-green)
![MC Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21%20→%201.21.11-yellow)

[![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Community-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/TubuNkwPam)  
[![NeoCity SMP](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-NeoCity%20SMP-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/YYkVVZwCaX)

---

**Notebook** is a highly customizable, lightweight **client-side** utility mod that brings interactive, draggable To-Do lists and Item Gathering trackers directly to your HUD. 

Perfect for keeping track of your grinding quotas, daily server tasks, or building materials without needing external apps or constantly alt-tabbing!  

---

### Draggable UI
![Draggable UI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/GUI/main/Draggable%20UI.gif)

### Adding & Managing Lists
![Adding list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/GUI/main/Adding%20list%20on%20notebook.gif)

### Pinning to HUD
![Pinning](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dev-jcwd/GUI/main/Pinning%20on%20notebook.gif)

---

# ✅ Features
- 📌 **Draggable UI** → Easily move your item and task lists around your screen using the Edit HUD menu.  
- 📋 **To-Do Lists** → Track your daily goals. Check off completed tasks dynamically to cross them out.  
- 📦 **Item Gathering Tracker** → Set a target amount for an item and track your inventory in real-time.  
- 🚦 **Smart Quota Colors** → Item text turns **Green** when you hit your exact target, and **Red** when you exceed it!  
- 🛡️ **Typo Protection** → Prevents you from accidentally adding invalid or misspelled items to your tracker.  
- 💬 **List Sharing** → Share your active item list straight to the server chat for team collaboration.  
- 📖 **Pagination** → Got a long list? Easily flip through pages using commands or customizable keybinds.  
- 💻 **100% Client-Side** → Works perfectly on vanilla servers or modded SMPs.  

---

# ⌨️ Commands

### 🎒 Item Lists (Aliases: `/il`)
- **/itemlists** → Shows all the item lists you have created.  
- **/il create <name>** → Creates and displays a new item list.  
- **/il delete <name>** → Deletes the specified list.  
- **/il display <name>** → Switches your HUD to show this list.  
- **/il add <listName> <item> <quantity>** → Adds an item quota to your list *(example: `/il add base dirt 64`)*.  
- **/il remove <listName> <item> <quantity>** → Removes an item from the list.  
- **/il share <name>** → Shares the item list to the server chat.  
- **/il next** or **/il n** → Flips to the next page of your item list.  
- **/il previous** or **/il p** → Flips to the previous page.  

### 📝 To-Do Lists (Command: `/todo`)
- **/todo** → Shows all your created To-Do lists.
- **/todo create <name>** → Creates a new To-Do list.
- **/todo delete <name>** → Deletes the specified To-Do list.
- **/todo display <name>** → Switches your HUD to show this To-Do list.
- **/todo add <listName> <task>** → Adds a new task to your list.
- **/todo check <listName> <task>** → Marks a task as completed.
- **/todo uncheck <listName> <task>** → Unmarks a task.
- **/todo next** or **/todo n** → Flips to the next page of tasks.
- **/todo previous** or **/todo p** → Flips to the previous page of tasks.

### ⛏️ Gathering Lists (Aliases: `/gl`)
- **/gatheringlists** → Shows all the gathering lists you have created.
- **/gl create <name>** → Creates and displays a new gathering list.
- **/gl delete <name>** → Deletes the specified list.
- **/gl display <name>** → Switches your HUD to show this list.
- **/gl add <listName> <item> <quantity>** → Adds an item to your gathering list.
- **/gl remove <listName> <item> <quantity>** → Removes an item from the gathering list.
- **/gl share <name>** → Shares the gathering list to the server chat.
- **/gl next** or **/gl n** → Flips to the next page of your gathering list.
- **/gl previous** or **/gl p** → Flips to the previous page.
- **/gl import** → Imports list data.
- **/gl help** → Displays general help instructions for gathering lists.

---

# ⚙️ Keybinds
*(Customizable in Options -> Controls -> Notebook)*
- **Edit HUD** → `]` *(Click and drag your lists anywhere!)*  
- **Toggle Item List** → `I`  
- **Toggle To-Do List** → `O`  
- **Toggle Gather List** → `G`  
- **Item List Next/Prev Page** → *(Unbound by default)*  
- **To-Do Next/Prev Page** → *(Unbound by default)*  
- **Gather Next/Prev Page** → *(Unbound by default)*
